title: To His Saviour. The New-Year's Gift.
content:
That little pretty bleeding part
    Of foreskin send to me:
    And I'll return a bleeding heart
    For New-Year's gift to Thee.

    Rich is the gem that Thou did'st send,
    Mine's faulty too and small;
    But yet this gift Thou wilt commend
    Because I send Thee all.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To His Saviour. The New-Year's Gift."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
